personas.name: coder
personas.description: This agent is good at coding in computer

actions: Open Folder dialog and navigate to Documents folder using 'execute_windows_command' tool.
Click File menu, select New File, name it calculator_app.py, and save the file using 'execute_windows_command' tool.
Write a minimalistic calculator code in the calculator_app.py file using 'execute_windows_command' tool, ensuring coding standards and IDE linting.
Save the calculator_app.py file using 'execute_windows_command' tool.
Execute calculator_app.py script using 'execute_windows_command' tool to verify functionality.
flows.sub_goal: Create, test, and prepare a basic calculator app in VS Code on my computer with coding standards and linting ensured.
